title: Raccoon Removal in Bedford, Westchester | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Bedford, Westchester. Licensed experts serving historic estates and residential properties. Fast response, humane removal. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Bedford, Westchester is known for its picturesque estates, wooded properties, and rural character, which unfortunately makes it prime territory for raccoon intrusions. Our professional raccoon removal services protect Bedford homes and historic properties from these intelligent and destructive wildlife pests. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive, humane raccoon removal with prices ranging from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation and property size.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has extensive experience serving Bedford's unique mix of historic estates, farms, and residential properties with wildlife-sensitive removal techniques. Our licensed technicians understand the local wildlife patterns in Westchester and provide thorough inspections, humane removal, damage repair, and exclusion services to ensure raccoons don't return to your Bedford property.
localContext: Bedford's extensive wooded areas, large properties, and proximity to the Mianus River Gorge create ideal habitats for raccoon populations that frequently seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and outbuildings. The area's historic homes and barns, along with properties near Bedford Village and surrounding rural neighborhoods, are particularly susceptible to raccoon entry points that require professional sealing and exclusion work.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Bedford, Westchester?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Bedford typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on factors such as the number of raccoons, location of the nest, extent of property damage, and whether babies are present. Larger Bedford estates or properties with multiple entry points may require more extensive work, while a single raccoon in an accessible attic would be at the lower end of the price range.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Bedford, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Bedford due to the area's abundant wooded properties, water sources, and rural character. The large estates, historic barns, and proximity to natural areas provide ideal habitats for raccoons, who often seek attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces for denning, especially during breeding season in spring and when seeking winter shelter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Bedford property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Bedford raccoon emergencies. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on whether we're dealing with a single raccoon or a mother with babies, which require special care. We'll conduct an initial inspection, humanely trap and remove the animals, then seal all entry points to prevent future intrusions.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Bedford homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause significant damage to Bedford properties, including torn insulation, destroyed ductwork, chewed electrical wiring, damaged roof vents and soffits, and contamination from feces and urine. They're strong enough to tear through wooden structures and can create multiple entry points in historic homes. Their waste can also pose health risks and create foul odors that permeate living spaces, making prompt professional removal essential.
